summary: Adjusted the opening to connect Cora's bank visit to the prior-night meeting at Hester's and to give the chapter a more distinct action-led entry point while preserving the chapter's existing beats, tone, and exit. The provided style bible did not include any example_lines, so none required replacement.
edits: Reframed the first paragraph around Cora at the hitch rail instead of a generic next-day opener.
Added a brief callback to the prior-night talk in Hester's back room to tighten the handoff from chapter 8.
